# Liffio

> Liffio is an Instagram DM automation platform. It sends automatic direct messages via Instagram's official API when users trigger events: commenting on a post, replying to a story, sending a DM, going live, or following the account.

## What Liffio does

Liffio connects to Instagram via official OAuth — no passwords stored. After authorization, you set up automation rules called "flows." Each flow watches for a specific trigger (a comment keyword, a story reply, a new follower, a live viewer message) and sends a personalized DM.

## Automation types

- Comment-to-DM: someone comments a keyword on a post or Reel → they receive a DM automatically
- Story reply automation: someone replies to a story → they receive a DM
- Live reply automation: someone messages during a live → they receive a DM
- DM reply automation: someone sends a DM keyword → they receive a reply
- Ask Follow (follow gate): user must follow before receiving a promised resource
- Smart Re-engage: re-send to contacts who haven't responded after N days
- Collect Data: ask follow-up questions in DM and store responses as leads
- Welcome DM: new follower → automatic welcome message

## Pricing (USD, billed monthly)

- Free: $0/month — unlimited DMs, comment keyword triggers, bio link page, basic analytics
- Starter: $9/month ($7/month billed annually) — all 8 automation types, unlimited templates, post scheduler, short links, lead capture
- Business: $79/month ($63/month billed annually) — everything in Starter plus conversion analytics, team members (5 seats), API access, follow-up sequences
- Agency: $299/month ($239/month billed annually) — white-label workspaces, client sub-workspaces, dedicated account manager, full API and webhooks

India pricing available via Razorpay in INR. All plans include unlimited Instagram accounts and unlimited automated DMs.

## Key facts

- Founded: 2026
- Team size: 3 people
- Location: India
- Instagram connection: official Meta Graph API with app review approval (no password required, no scraping)
- Send delays: 10–60 seconds per automation (configurable, human-like)
- Data: GDPR-compliant, contact data exportable and deletable from dashboard
- Payment: Stripe (USD global) and Razorpay (INR India)
- Competing tools: ManyChat, SendDM, Chatfuel, ReplyRush, LinkDM, SuperProfile, InstaChamp, Zorcha
